EMAIL 1 - Neutral Introduction

Subject: New user saying hi!

Hi AromaGuard team,

I just set up my account and wanted to introduce myself! I'm Rachel, and I've been getting more interested in essential oils over the past year. I use them mainly for aromatherapy and occasional household cleaning.

I decided to get a safety app because I want to make sure I'm using essential oils responsibly. There's so much conflicting information online, so having a reliable source for safety checks seems really important.

Looking forward to using AromaGuard and learning more about safe essential oil practices!

Best,
Rachel

---

EMAIL 2 - Casual Follow-up

Subject: Getting started with AromaGuard

Hi,

Just wanted to drop a quick note to say I've been exploring the app and it looks really well-designed! I appreciate how thorough the safety information is.

I'll probably be submitting my first few safety check requests soon as I review the essential oils I currently have at home. It'll be good to know I'm using everything properly.

Thanks for creating such a helpful tool!

Rachel
